stemHtml:
Before departure for a flight, the load controller presents to you cargo documents for boxes containing spare parts. These boxes have a total mass of 4500 kg. If you accept all the boxes, given the following information, what will be the Underload/Overload?

Allowed Take-Off Mass: 76 720 kg
Maximum Zero Fuel Mass: 62 731 kg
Operating Mass: 58 799 kg
Actual Zero Fuel Mass: 55 063 kg
Actual Traffic Load (without the boxes): 12 563 kg
Take-off fuel: 16 299 kg

Disregard changes in fuel due to the increase in Total Mass.
Consider no restrictions on structural limits and Allowed Landing Mass.
